title: [MTR3/4] Virgin BR Class 221 Super Voyager
description: Resource pack that adds Virgin Super Voyagers into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![Virgin Trains Class 221](https://i.imgur.com/ntEXk8h.png)
The British Rail Class 221 Super Voyager is a class of tilting diesel-electric multiple unit express passenger trains built in Bruges, Belgium and Wakefield, by Bombardier Transportation in 2001–02.

The class is similar to the Class 220 Voyager, but was built with a tilting mechanism enabling up to six degrees of tilt to allow higher speeds on curved tracks. Additionally, most have five coaches, and they have a different bogie design. They have a maximum speed of 125 mph (200 km/h).

This resource pack is to add the Virgin Trains BR Class 221 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by PlaneSimple for Transport Fever 2 and Converted to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2025.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Virgin Rail Group.
